title: lastrea cana
intro: Lastrea cana, also known as the leathery fern, is a species of plant in the family Athyriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Lastrea cana include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Lastrea cana often involve infusions of the plant's dried fronds, which can be consumed as a tea to reap its medicinal benefits.
